div.p: All States, Transitions, and Illegal Transitions

ul.li: Error / timeout path ═══ ILLEGAL transition (must not occur) ● Initial state 🔴 Error / terminal state

div.p: Invariant read_buf accumulating bytes Scanning for \r\n\r\n header_timer armed
Invariant Headers parsed, body absent body_received < content_length read_buf accumulating body
Invariant Request fully parsed http_process_request() running header_timer cancelled
Invariant Response bytes in write_buf Draining to socket EPOLLOUT armed if EAGAIN
Invariant Response fully sent write_buf empty, EPOLLOUT disarmed Idle timer reset, header timer armed Waiting for next request bytes
Invariant Timers cancelled fd deregistered from reactor write_buf freed close(fd) called free(conn) deferred
